blocks.text: Match preview: India A face Sri Lanka A in Final (ODI) on Sun, 21 Jun, 2026, 10:00 am at Rangiri Dambulla International Stadium Dambulla. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: India A vs Sri Lanka A
Tri Nation A Series in Sri Lanka  2026
Sri Lanka A opt to bowl

blocks.text: Standard ODI surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 250–290 runs par score.
Thunderstorm · High 30°C / Low 24°C · Rain: 2.4 mm · Wind: up to 27 km/h. Rain likely — DLS may apply; favour bowlers who hit the deck and teams with depth.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
